answer:
<think> I'm thinking about the "Fuzion" system, which is a game development tool. I'm trying to recall who co-developed it. I remember that the co-developer of the "Fuzion" system is also a well-known game designer. I'm thinking of notable game designers who might have worked on a solo project. I'm recalling that the co-developer of the "Fuzion" system is also the creator of the game "Baldur's Gate". I'm thinking of notable games created by the co-developer of the "Fuzion" system. I'm trying to remember if they published a game on their own. I'm recalling that the co-developer of the "Fuzion" system is James Ohlen, and I'm thinking of his solo game. I'm trying to remember the name of the game. I'm recalling that James Ohlen published the game "Neverwinter Nights" on his own. I'm confident that's the correct answer. </think>
<answer> Neverwinter Nights </answer>
